I know firsthand how problematic bots replies can be when it comes to pronouns and genitals when ftm/mtf, so here are some tips:

“I constantly have incomplete or repetitive replies from the same message”

you can try new replies using the ‘>’ option at the chat end, or delete your message and resend it (remember to copy before deleting). always make the pronouns and gender clear as possible.

“The response seem to be nonsensical, or not written coherently”

remember that I only have responsibility for the initial message, after that it's AI generated messages. so check your API and Generation settings for a good roleplay.
